subject: URGENT: Production server is down
body: Our main API server has been unresponsive for 15 minutes. Customers cannot log in. Immediate action required.

subject: Invoice #4821 we were charged twice
body: Hi, we were charged twice for last month subscription. Please issue a refund or apply a credit. Thank you.

subject: Cannot reset my password
body: I have tried resetting my password three times but never receive the reset email. Can you help me regain access?

subject: Patent infringement claim legal notice
body: Our client alleges your product infringes a patent. Please forward to your legal counsel immediately. Response required within 14 days.

subject: You have won a 500 dollar gift card
body: Congratulations! You have been selected as our lucky winner. Click here to claim your prize before it expires tonight.

subject: New hire onboarding docs please sign by Friday
body: Please review and sign the attached onboarding documents for our new hire starting Monday. Must be returned by end of day Friday.

subject: Getting rate limit errors on your API since morning
body: We are hitting 429 errors on your API starting around 8am. Our product integration is completely broken and customers are complaining.

subject: We would like to cancel our subscription
body: We would like to cancel our Enterprise subscription at end of this billing cycle. Please confirm and let us know the required steps.

subject: Free webinar invite AI Trends 2025
body: Join us for a free webinar on the future of AI. Register now to secure your spot. Limited seats available.

subject: Possible GDPR data breach urgent legal review needed
body: We detected that a shared dataset may have been exposed to unauthorized parties. This could be a GDPR data breach. Immediate legal review recommended.
